translations.**Step 1.** 在越獄手機上打開「 **Cydia** 」-&gt; 搜: **Step 1.** On the jailbroken iPhone, open **Cydia** -> search for **LookinLoader** -> **Install** -> go back to the phone’s **Settings** -> **Lookin** -> **Enabled Applications** -> **Enable the apps you want to inspect**.
translations.**Step 2.** 使用傳輸線 **將手機連接至 Mac 電腦** -&gt: **Step 2.** Use a USB cable **to connect the iPhone to the Mac** -> **open the app you want to inspect** -> return to the computer, **select the app screen in the Lookin tool** -> you can then **view the layout structure**.

translations.**另一個工具 APP Configurator 2 只能提取有保護的檔案，沒意: **Another tool, APP Configurator 2, can only extract protected files. Since it is not very useful, it will not be discussed further. Those interested in using this tool can [click here](https://blog.csdn.net/aa464971/article/details/87955711){:target="_blank"} to see the tutorial.*
translations.**環境都弄好之後，開工：**\n\n: **After setting up the environment, start working:**
translations.**這兩個工具在日常開發自己的 APP 上都非常有幫助！**\n\n: **These two tools are very helpful in daily development of your own APP!**
translations.**附上一個自己犯蠢的經驗：** 下載完舊版 IPSW 檔案後，手機接上 Mac: **An experience where I made a silly mistake:** After downloading an older IPSW file, I connected my phone to the Mac and used Finder’s file browser (since iTunes was removed after macOS 10.5). In the left sidebar under Locations, I selected the phone, which brought up the phone info screen. Then, **holding down the "Option" key and clicking "Restore iPhone"** opened a window to select the IPSW file. Choosing the downloaded older IPSW allowed me to complete the downgrade and restore.
translations.**首先我們先準備 Mac 上的環境：**\n\n: **First, let's prepare the environment on the Mac:**
translations.*了解完流程環境及有趣的部分之後，就讓我們進入正題吧！*\n\n: *After understanding the process environment and interesting parts, let's get to the main topic!*
translations.*以下開始都需要越獄手機配合\n\n: *The following steps require a jailbroken iPhone*
translations.*若沒有越獄手機也沒關係，此工具主要是讓你用在開發中的專案上，查看 Debug: *It's okay if you don't have a jailbroken phone. This tool is mainly for use in projects under development to inspect debug layouts (replacing Xcode's basic inspector) and **can be used regularly during development**!*
- **chose()** : Get target

- **UIApp.keyWindow.recursiveDescription().toString()** : Display the view hierarchy structure information

- **new Instance (Memory Address):** Get object

- **exit(0)** : Exit
translations.- Open \"Cydia\" on the jailbroken devic:
- Open "Cydia" on the jailbroken device -> Search for "Cycript" -> "Install"

- Open a Terminal on your computer and use Open SSH to connect to the phone with `ssh root@phoneIP` (default password is `alpine`)

- Open the target APP (keep the APP in the foreground)

- In Terminal, enter `ps -e | grep APP Bundle ID` to find the running APP Process ID

- Use `cycript -p Process ID` to inject the tool into the running APP
translations.- The phone must be unlocked to use the:
- The phone must be unlocked to use the tools.

- If connection errors or "reset by peer" occur, try unplugging and reconnecting the USB, or restarting iproxy.
translations.- Viewing the App UI Layout and Structur:
- Viewing the App UI Layout and Structure

- Obtaining the APP Resource Directory .assets/.plist/icon…

- Modifying APP Functionality and Repackaging (e.g., Removing Ads)

- Decompiling to infer the original code content and obtain business logic information

- Dumping .h Header Files / Keychain Content
1. Mac comes with Python 2.7 by default. This tool supports Python 2.X/3.X, so there's no need to install Python separately. However, I use Python 3.X for operations. If you encounter issues with Python 2.X, consider [installing and using Python 3](https://stringpiggy.hpd.io/mac-osx-python3-multiple-pyenv-install/){:target="_blank"}!

2. Install [pip](https://pip.pypa.io/en/stable/installing/){:target="_blank"} (Python package manager)

3. Install [frida](https://frida.re/){:target="_blank"} using pip:  
   `sudo pip install frida -upgrade -ignore-installed six` (python 2.X)  
   `sudo pip3 install frida -upgrade -ignore-installed six` (python 3.X)

4. In Terminal, enter `frida-ps`. If there is no error message, it means the installation was successful!

5. Clone the [AloneMonkey/frida-ios-dump](https://github.com/AloneMonkey/frida-ios-dump){:target="_blank"} project

6. Enter the project and open the dump.py file with a text editor

7. Verify if the SSH connection settings are correct (usually no changes needed)  
   User = ‘root’  
   Password = ‘alpine’  
   Host = ‘localhost’  
   Port = 2222
translations.1.將手機使用 USB 連接到電腦\n\n: 1. Connect the phone to the computer using a USB cable
translations.2.在 Mac 上打開一個 Terminal 輸入 `iproxy 2222 2: 2. Open a Terminal on your Mac and enter `iproxy 2222 22` to start the server.
translations.3.確保手機/電腦處於相同網路環境中(EX: 連同個WiFi)\n\n: 3. Ensure the phone and computer are on the same network (e.g., connected to the same WiFi)
translations.4.再打開一個 Terminal 輸入 ssh root@127.0.0.1，輸: 4. Open another Terminal and enter ssh root@127.0.0.1, then input the SSH password (default is `alpine`)
translations.5.再打開一個 Terminal 進行敲殼命令操作，cd 到 clone 下來的: 5. Open another Terminal to run the dumping commands, and cd into the cloned /frida-ios-dump directory.
translations.6. 找到要敲殼導出的 APP 名稱 / Bundle ID，輸入：\n\n: 6. Find the APP name / Bundle ID to dump, then enter:
translations.7. 輸出成功後就能取得已敲殼的 .ipa 檔案！\n\n: 7. After a successful export, you will get the decrypted .ipa file!
translations.7.將 .ipa 檔直接重新命名成 .zip 檔，然後直接右鍵解壓縮檔\n\n: 7. Rename the .ipa file directly to .zip, then right-click to extract the archive.
translations.> ***Only jailbroken iPhones can be used: > ***Only jailbroken iPhones can be used to analyze third-party apps.***

translations.> I foolishly pressed Restore iPhone… it: > I foolishly pressed Restore iPhone… it just wastes time by reinstalling the latest version again…
translations.> The answer is definitely yes! Even wit: > The answer is definitely yes! Even without actual testing, there is no unbreakable system in the world, only the matter of time cost. When the time and effort needed to crack it exceed the benefits, it can be considered secure!
translations.> [>>The app uses HTTPS for transmission: > [>>The app uses HTTPS for transmission, but data was still stolen.](../46410aaada00/)
translations.Mac 本身自帶 Python 2.7 版本，此工具支援 Python 2.X/: Mac comes with Python 2.7 by default. This tool supports Python 2.X/3.X, so there's no need to install Python separately. However, I use Python 3.X for operations. If you encounter issues with Python 2.X, consider [installing and using Python 3](https://stringpiggy.hpd.io/mac-osx-python3-multiple-pyenv-install/){:target="_blank"}!

translations.[*nygard/class-dump*](https://github.com: [*nygard/class-dump*](https://github.com/nygard/class-dump){:target="*blank"} _I tried this great tool but kept failing; in the end, I succeeded only by using the modified class-dump tool from [AloneMonkey](https://github.com/AloneMonkey){:target="_blank"} / [MonkeyDev](https://github.com/AloneMonkey/MonkeyDev){:target="_blank"} toolkit._
translations.```\ncy# alert = [[UIAlertView alloc] in:
```
cy# alert = [[UIAlertView alloc] initWithTitle:@"HIHI" message:@"ZhgChg.li" delegate:nil cancelButtonTitle:@"Cancel" otherButtonTitles:nl]
cy# [alert show]
```
translations.dump 成功之後就能獲取到整個 APP 的 .h 資訊。\n\n: After a successful dump, you can obtain the entire app's .h information.
translations.不過我也就止步於此了，因為從這開始就要研究機器碼、搭配 class-dump 結: However, I stopped here because from this point on, you need to study machine code, infer methods using class-dump results, and so on; it requires very advanced skills!
translations.之前唯一做過跟安全有關的就只有 [**&lt;&lt; 使用中間人攻擊嗅探傳輸資: The only security-related topic I have done before is [**<< Using Man-in-the-Middle Attack to Sniff Transmission Data >>**](../46410aaada00/); building on that, suppose we encrypt data before transmission and decrypt it inside the app to prevent man-in-the-middle sniffing—can the data still be stolen?
translations.任何版本的 iOS、iPhone 都可以，只要是能越獄的設備，建議使用舊的手機或: Any iOS or iPhone version can be used as long as the device is jailbroken. It is recommended to use an older phone or a development device to avoid unnecessary risks. You can refer to [瘋先生越獄教學](https://mrmad.com.tw/category/jb/jailbreak){:target="_blank"} based on your phone and iOS version. If necessary, downgrade iOS using [iOS 降版](https://mrmad.com.tw/new-ios-downgrade-old-ios){:target="_blank"} ([check signing status](https://mrmad.com.tw/ios-firmware){:target="_blank"}) before jailbreaking.
translations.使用 `cycript -p Process ID` 注入工具到正在運行的 AP: Use `cycript -p Process ID` to inject the tool into the running APP
Using the class-dump tool to export all .h header files of the entire APP (including Frameworks) (Objective-C only; not applicable for Swift projects)
translations.使用 pip 安裝 [frida](https://frida.re/){:ta:
Install [frida](https://frida.re/){:target="_blank"} using pip:  
`sudo pip install frida -upgrade -ignore-installed six` (python 2.X)  
`sudo pip3 install frida -upgrade -ignore-installed six` (python 3.X)
translations.前面介紹過，再推一次；在自己的專案日常開發上也非常好用，建議購買使用 Revea: As mentioned before, recommending it again; it is also very useful for daily development in your own projects. I suggest purchasing and using Reveal.
translations.原本的「建立新帳號」被我改成「哈哈哈」\n\n: The original "Create New Account" was changed by me to "Hahaha"
translations.反編譯推測原始程式碼內容取得商業邏輯資訊\n: Decompile to infer the original code content and obtain business logic information
translations.可以使用 [IDA](https://www.hex-rays.com/prod: You can use the decompilation tools [IDA](https://www.hex-rays.com/products/ida/support/links.shtml){:target="_blank"} and [Hopper](https://www.hopperapp.com/){:target="_blank"} for analysis. Both are paid tools, but [Hopper](https://www.hopperapp.com/){:target="_blank"} offers a free trial (30 minutes per session).
translations.可以選擇使用 [CocoaPods](https://lookin.work/f: You can choose to install via [CocoaPods](https://lookin.work/faq/integration-cocoapods/){:target="_blank"}, [Breakpoint Insertion](https://lookin.work/faq/integration-breakpoint/){:target="_blank"} (simulator only), [Manual Framework Import into Project](https://lookin.work/faq/integration-sourcecode/){:target="_blank"}, or [Manual Setup](https://lookin.work/faq/integration-manual/){:target="_blank"}, four methods in total.
translations.可使用 Objective-c/Javascript 進行調試控制。\n\n: Debugging and control can be done using Objective-C/JavaScript.
translations.可在左側欄檢視 View Hierarchy、右側欄對選中的物件進行動態修改。\: You can view the View Hierarchy in the left sidebar and dynamically modify the selected object in the right sidebar.
translations.在 APP名稱.app 右鍵 → 「Show Package Contents」: Right-click on APPName.app → "Show Package Contents" to view the app's resource directory.
translations.在 Terminal 輸入 `frida-ps` 如果沒錯誤訊息代表安裝成功！\: In Terminal, enter `frida-ps`. If there is no error message, it means the installation was successful!
translations.在 Terminal 輸入 `ps -e | grep APP Bundle I: In Terminal, enter `ps -e | grep APP Bundle ID` to find the running APP Process ID
translations.在越獄手機上打開「Cydia」-> 搜尋「Cycript」->「安裝」\n: Open "Cydia" on the jailbroken device -> Search for "Cycript" -> "Install"
translations.在電腦打開一個 Terminal 使用 Open SSH 連線至手機， `ssh: Open a Terminal on your computer and use Open SSH to connect to the phone with `ssh root@phoneIP` (default password is `alpine`)
translations.安裝 Frida 源：Cydia → 來源 → 右上角「編輯」 → 左上角「加入: Install Frida Source: Cydia → Sources → Top right "Edit" → Top left "Add" → [https://build.frida.re](https://build.frida.re/){:target="_blank"}
translations.安裝 Frida：Cydia → 搜尋 → Frida → 依照手機處理器版本安: Install Frida: Cydia → Search → Frida → Install the tool matching your phone's processor version (e.g., I have an iPhone 6 A11, so I installed `Frida for pre-A12 devices`).
translations.安裝 Open SSH ：Cydia → 搜尋 → Open SSH →安裝\n: Install Open SSH: Cydia → Search → Open SSH → Install
translations.將專案 Build + Run 起來之後，就能 **在 Lookin 工具上選擇: After building and running the project, you can **select the APP screen in the Lookin tool** -> **view the layout structure**.
translations.對物件的修改也會實時的顯示在手機 APP 上，如上圖。\n\n: Modifications to objects will also be reflected in real-time on the mobile app, as shown in the image above.
translations.就如同網頁的「F12」開發者工具，所有的修改僅對 View 有效，不會影響實際的: Just like the "F12" developer tools in web browsers, all modifications only affect the View and do not impact the actual data. It is mainly used for debugging, but you can also use it to change values, take screenshots, and prank your friends XD
translations.從越獄、提取iPA檔敲殼到UI分析注入及反編譯的探索過程\n\n: Jailbreaking, Extracting IPA, Cracking, UI Analysis, Injection, and Reverse Engineering Exploration Process
translations.我們先來點有趣的前菜，使用工具搭配越獄手機查看別人APP 是怎麼排版。\n\n: Let's start with a fun appetizer: using tools along with a jailbroken phone to see how other people's apps are laid out.
translations.我們將取得的 APP名稱.app 檔案直接拉到 Hopper 即可開始進行分析。: We can directly drag the obtained APPName.app file into Hopper to start the analysis.
translations.我是拿之前的舊手機 iPhone 6 來測試，原本已經升到 iOS 12.4.5: I used an old iPhone 6 for testing. It was originally updated to iOS 12.4.5, but jailbreak kept failing on 12.4.5. Fortunately, I downgraded to 12.4.4 and successfully jailbroke it using [checkra1n](https://checkra.in/){:target="_blank"}!
translations.我本來傻傻的直接按 Restore iPhone…只會浪費時間重刷一次最新版而已: I foolishly pressed Restore iPhone… it just wastes time by reinstalling the latest version again…
translations.所有從 App Store 安裝的 APP，其中的 .ipa 檔案都有 [Fai: All apps installed from the App Store have their .ipa files protected by [FairPlay DRM](https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ipa%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6){:target="_blank"}, commonly known as shell protection. Removing this protection is called "cracking the shell." Therefore, simply extracting the .ipa from the App Store is meaningless and unusable.
translations.手機必須在解鎖情況下才能使用工具\n: The phone must be unlocked to use the tools.
translations.打開 Terminal 直接使用：\n`./class-dump -H APP路:
Open Terminal and use directly:
`./class-dump -H APP_PATH/APP_NAME.app -o OUTPUT_PATH`
translations.打開目標 APP (APP 保持在前景)\n: Open the target APP (keep the APP in the foreground)
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.查看 APP UI 排版方式、結構\n: Viewing the App UI Layout and Structure
translations.查看工具： 一是 老牌 [Reveal](https://revealapp.c: Viewing Tools: First is the classic [Reveal](https://revealapp.com/){:target="_blank"} (more features, costs about $60 with a trial available). The second is the free open-source tool [lookin](https://lookin.work/){:target="_blank"} made by Tencent's QMUI Team. Here, lookin is used for demonstration; Reveal is quite similar.
translations.步驟不多，也不難；只是需要時間等待！\n\n: The steps are few and not difficult; they just require some waiting time!
translations.直接從這裡 Download [MonkeyDev/bin/class-dump: Download the tool directly from here [MonkeyDev/bin/class-dump](https://github.com/AloneMonkey/MonkeyDev/blob/master/bin/class-dump){:target="_blank"}
translations.確認 SSH 連線設定部分是否正確 (預設不用特別動)\nUser = ‘roo:
Verify if the SSH connection settings are correct (usually no changes needed)
User = ‘root’
Password = ‘alpine’
Host = ‘localhost’
Port = 2222
translations.突破反編譯後，可以自行竄改運作重新打包成新的 APP。\n\n: After bypassing decompilation, you can modify the operation yourself and repackage it into a new APP.
translations.竄改 APP 功能重新打包 (EX: 去廣告)\n: Modify APP Functionality and Repackage (EX: Remove Ads)
translations.答案是肯定的！，就算沒真的試驗過；世界上沒有破不了的系統，只有時間成本的問題，當: The answer is definitely yes! Even without actual testing; there is no unbreakable system in the world, only the issue of time cost. When the time and effort required to crack exceed the benefits, it can be considered secure!
translations.若出現連線錯誤、reset by peer…等原因，可嘗試拔掉重插 USB 連接: If connection errors or "reset by peer" occur, try unplugging and reconnecting the USB, or restarting iproxy.
translations.詳細操作可參考 [此篇文章](https://sevencho.github.i: For detailed instructions, please refer to [this article](https://sevencho.github.io/archives/c12f47b1.html){:target="_blank"}.
translations.詳細操作請參考 [此篇文章](https://sevencho.github.i: For detailed steps, please refer to [this article](https://sevencho.github.io/archives/65ed9c65.html){:target="_blank"}, but I was unable to get it to work. According to the project issues, it seems to fail on iOS ≥ 12.
translations.輸入 `dump.py -l` 列出手機中已安裝/正在執行的 APP。\n\n: Enter `dump.py -l` to list the apps installed/running on the device.
translations.這個領域是個超級大坑，需要非常多的技術知識基礎才有可能精通；本篇文章只是粗淺了「: This field is a huge pitfall and requires a solid technical foundation to master; this article only provides a brief "experience" of what reverse engineering feels like, so please forgive any shortcomings! **For academic research only, do not use for malicious purposes**; personally, I found the whole process and tools quite interesting and gained a better understanding of app security!
translations.這邊使用 [frida-ios-dump](https://github.com: Here, we use the Python tool [frida-ios-dump](https://github.com/AloneMonkey/frida-ios-dump){:target="_blank"} for dynamic dumping, which is very convenient to use!
translations.這邊務必指定 **輸出結果的路徑/檔名** ，因為預設輸出路徑會在 `/opt/: Here, you must specify the **output path/filename**, because the default output path is `/opt/dump/frida-ios-dump/`. Since we don't want to move it to `/opt/dump`, specifying the output path is necessary to avoid permission errors.
translations.進入專案，用文字編輯器打開 dump.py 檔案\n: Enter the project and open the dump.py file with a text editor
translations.都做到這樣了，那還能怎麼破？就是本篇想記錄的議題 — **「逆向工程 」** ，: Having come this far, how else can it be cracked? This is exactly the topic I want to record — **"Reverse Engineering"** — to unlock your APP and study how you do encryption and decryption. I've always been somewhat clueless about this field, only attending two major talks at iPlayground 2019, roughly understanding the principles and implementation. Recently, I had the chance to try it out and want to share it with everyone!
translations.關於工具部分起初我使用的是 [Clutch](https://github.co: Regarding tools, I initially used [Clutch](https://github.com/KJCracks/Clutch/releases){:target="_blank"}, but it always showed FAILED. After checking the project's issues, I found many people had the same problem. It seems this tool no longer works on iOS ≥ 12. There is also a classic tool called [dumpdecrypted](https://juejin.im/post/5d31e948f265da1bd2612788){:target="_blank"}, but I haven't explored it.
translations.雖然 Reveal 需要付費才能使用，但個人還是比較喜歡 Reveal；在結構顯: Although Reveal requires a paid license, I personally prefer Reveal; it provides more detailed structure display, and the info panel on the right is almost the same as the XCode development environment. You can make real-time adjustments as needed, and it also alerts Constraint Errors, which is very helpful for UI layout fixes!
